General.Name: Broadpeak SA
General.Description: Broadpeak Société anonyme, together with its subsidiaries, provides streaming services and solutions for content and broadband service providers in France, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, North America, Latin America, and the Asia Pacific. The company offers Advanced CDN, a content delivery network solution for video streaming; Cloud DVR, a network recording solution for tv recordings; content personalization, a customized solution for targeted advertising insertion and video content; Multicast ABR, which upgrades IPTV to ABR; Origin Packager, used for packaging and encrypting video content; CDN selection that enables content providers and pay-TV operators to select the content delivery network; EdgePeak, a caching and edge computing software engine with open APIs; and CDN security and anti-piracy solution. It also provides hosting cloud environments; broadpeak.io, a video API SaaS platform; and peakVU.TV, an IPTV managed service. The company was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Cesson-Sévigné, France.

1.Name: Mr. Dominique  Colombel
1.Title: Co-Founder, VP of Research & Development and Director
